nasb.text: Rest in the Lord and wait patiently for Him; Do not fret because of him who prospers in his way, Because of the man who carries out wicked schemes.

esv.text: Be still before the Lord and wait patiently for him; fret not yourself over the one who prospers in his way, over the man who carries out evil devices!

cnv.text: 你要在耶和華面前靜默無聲， 耐心地等候他； 不要因那凡事順利的， 和那惡謀得逞的，心懷不平。

ccb.text: 要在耶和华面前安静， 耐心等候祂， 不要因恶人道路通达、阴谋得逞而愤愤不平。

csbs.text: 你要在耶和华面前静默，耐心等候他； 不要因那道路通达、施行诡计的人而心怀不平。
